Uses of Package
com.longbridge.portfolio

  • Packages that use com.longbridge.portfolio 
    Package Description
    com.longbridge.portfolio  
  • Classes in com.longbridge.portfolio used by com.longbridge.portfolio 
    Class Description
    AssetType
    Asset class category.
    ExchangeRate
    One currency exchange rate.
    ExchangeRates
    Response for PortfolioContext.getExchangeRate().
    FlowDirection
    Trade flow direction for profit-analysis flow records.
    FlowItem
    One profit-analysis flow record for ProfitAnalysisFlowsResponse.
    PortfolioContext
    Portfolio analytics context — exchange rates, P&L analysis.
    ProfitAnalysis
    Combined response for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysis(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisByMarket
    Response for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysisByMarket(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisByMarketOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisByMarketItem
    One security entry in a by-market P&L response.
    ProfitAnalysisByMarketOptions
    Options for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysisByMarket(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisByMarketOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisDetail
    Response for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysisDetail(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisDetailOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisDetailOptions
    Options for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysisDetail(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisDetailOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisFlowsOptions
    Options for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysisFlows(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisFlowsOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisFlowsResponse
    Response for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysisFlows(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisFlowsOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisItem
    P&L for one security.
    ProfitAnalysisOptions
    Options for PortfolioContext.getProfitAnalysis(com.longbridge.portfolio.ProfitAnalysisOptions).
    ProfitAnalysisSublist
    Per-security P&L breakdown.
    ProfitAnalysisSummary
    Account-level P&L summary.
    ProfitDetailEntry
    One P&L detail line item (credit, debit, or fee).
    ProfitDetails
    Detailed P&L breakdown for one asset class.
    ProfitSummaryBreakdown
    P&L breakdown by asset type.
    ProfitSummaryInfo
    P&L summary for one asset category.
